description: Remove all time.sleep() calls that add artificial delays (50ms, 20ms, 30ms) to API endpoints
Fix the _load_records() function to actually use _records_cache, eliminating disk I/O on every request
Build lookup indexes at startup: id_to_record dict for O(1) item lookups and category_to_records dict for O(1) category filtering
Remove inefficient string concatenation in /api/items endpoint and eliminate double json serialization in get_item endpoint
